markdown.markdown:
I am an Accounting and Finance student at Dublin City University with a strong interest in financial analysis, corporate governance, and sustainable business practices. My academic background has equipped me with solid foundations in financial reporting, data analysis, and strategic decision-making. I have developed practical experience through coursework involving financial modelling, ESG evaluation, and business case analysis. I am particularly interested in how financial insights can support long-term value creation and responsible corporate strategy. I enjoy working with data, interpreting financial trends, and presenting insights in a clear and structured way. I am currently seeking opportunities to further develop my skills in finance, consulting, or data-driven business roles. --- ## Projects

Project 1: SME Strategic Financial Diagnostic

A comprehensive diagnostic of corporate financial health using Python. This project covers profitability ratios, liquidity assessment, and DCF valuation models to translate complex datasets into strategic investment recommendations and trend forecasts.

View Report

Project 2: Nestlé ESG Governance & Climate Accountability

An advanced data visualization project evaluating Nestlé’s structural governance and environmental delivery. By integrating Python-driven radar and bullet charts, it analyzes the alignment between executive remuneration and 2025 plastic reduction targets.

View Report

Project 3: Datalex plc Corporate Governance Diagnostic

A strategic case study on governance risks within the aviation tech sector. It identifies critical independence deficits and ownership concentration issues, benchmarking Datalex against QCA standards to assess long-term reputational and operational risks.

View PDF

Project 4: Strategic Macro-Financial Report – Thailand

A high-level economic resilience analysis utilizing the AD/AS Framework and IMF Art.This strategic diagnostic models Thailand's fiscal transition—including a 5-year VAT sensitivity analysis—and evaluates the impact of structural debt on monetary policy effectiveness. It specifically addresses accounting implications under IAS 36 and inventory valuation risks in slow-growth export sectors.

View PDF
--- ## Education {#education}
### Dublin City University **BSc Accounting & Finance** | *2023 – 2026* ::: {.panel-tabset} ## **Finance** * [{{< fa landmark >}}]{.secondary} **Corporate Finance** * [{{< fa calculator >}}]{.secondary} **Management Accounting** * [{{< fa chart-line >}}]{.secondary} **Strategic Business Analysis** * [{{< fa file-invoice-dollar >}}]{.secondary} Financial Statement Analysis (IAS/IFRS) ## **Taxation** * [{{< fa scale-balanced >}}]{.secondary} **Income Tax** * [{{< fa building-columns >}}]{.secondary} **Corporation Tax** * [{{< fa percentage >}}]{.secondary} **VAT Sensitivity Analysis** * [{{< fa gavel >}}]{.secondary} Irish Company Law ## **Technology** * [{{< fa code >}}]{.secondary} **Python for Finance** (Pandas, NumPy) * [{{< fa laptop-code >}}]{.secondary} **Financial Modelling** * [{{< fa chart-pie >}}]{.secondary} **Business Intelligence** (Power BI & Tableau) * [{{< fa microchip >}}]{.secondary} AI Fundamentals for Business :::
--- ## Experience {#experience}
**Sales Assistant | Butlers Chocolate Café, Dublin** *Jan 2024 – Present* * **Financial Integrity:** Manage high-volume financial transactions with precision, ensuring accurate daily cash reconciliation and rigorous financial record-keeping. * **Client Relations:** Cultivate enduring relationships with frequent clients through professional service and high emotional intelligence, enhancing brand loyalty. **Customer Server & Shift Audit Support | KFC, Dublin** *Jul 2022 – Jan 2024* * **Audit Operations:** Conducted daily shift-change audits to verify stock levels and financial totals, ensuring 100% compliance with franchise accounting standards. * **Inventory Management:** Oversaw supply chain and inventory controls to minimize waste, demonstrating the meticulousness required for precise financial reporting. **Crew Member | McDonald’s, Dublin** *Feb 2022 – Jul 2022* * **Regulatory Compliance:** Adhered to strict international franchise regulations, maintaining operational standards in a fast-paced, high-compliance environment. * **Communication:** Mastered order accuracy and client-facing communication, developing the foundational soft skills essential for advisory and financial service roles.
--- ## Skills & Certifications {#skills}
* **Financial Analysis:** Expert in **Financial Modelling**, **Ratio Analysis**, and **Valuation** methodologies. [Click to view: [Introduction to Financial Statements](01.jpg)] * **Technical Proficiency:** * **Advanced MS Excel:** Building complex models and data structures. [Click to view: [Build Your First Model](02.jpg)] * **Python:** Data preparation and analysis using **Pandas** and **NumPy**. [Click to view: [Python Fundamentals](03.jpg)] * **Data Visualization:** Creating professional insights in **Tableau** and **Power BI**. [Click to view: [Power BI Dashboard](04.jpg) | [Tableau Visualizations](05.jpg) | [Data Presentation Skills](07.jpg)] * **AI & Innovation:** Knowledgeable in **Predicting Scenarios** and **AI Fundamentals** for business. [Click to view: [AI Fundamentals Certificate](06.jpg)] ::: {.section-content style="margin-top: 1em;"} * [x] **Compliance & Audit:** Experienced in **Statutory Audit Support**, **Regulatory Conformity**, and **Inventory Control** within franchise environments. * [x] **Soft Skills:** **Professional Communication**, **Emotional Intelligence**, and **Strategic Problem Solving** developed through high-volume, client-facing roles.
